Package ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl

@NullMarked package ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl
Fluent internal DSL built on top of the public BLE API.

This package exposes a set of builder types that let callers express discovery, connection, and device-control operations as readable method-chaining sequences without dealing with raw UUIDs, byte arrays, or CompletableFuture composition directly.

Entry point: 

BrickDsl.open()
    .scan()
    .forLegoHubs()
    .first()
    .thenConnect()
    .asLego()
    .requestBatteryVoltage()
    .motor(0x00).startSpeed(80)
    .done();

All types in this package are part of the public API. Each DSL class delegates exclusively to the interfaces defined in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api and to the protocol constants in the device packages. No direct dependency on any impl class is permitted here.

DSL maintenance rule: every change to the public API ( BleScanner, BleConnection, BleDevice, or any protocol constant class in ch.varani.bricks.ble.device.*) must be reflected in the corresponding DSL type in this package before the change is considered complete. See AGENTS.md §16 for the full rule.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
    Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BrickDsl
    Entry point for the fluent BLE brick DSL.
    BuWizz2Dsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for BuWizz 2.0 protocol operations.
    BuWizz3Dsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for BuWizz 3.0 protocol operations.
    CircuitCubesDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for Circuit Cubes motor control operations.
    ConnectionDsl
    Fluent builder for an active BLE connection.
    DeviceDsl
    Fluent builder that wraps a discovered (but not yet connected) BleDevice.
    LegoDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3) operations.
    LegoDsl.HubActionBuilder
    Fluent builder for Hub Action commands.
    LegoDsl.MotorBuilder
    Fluent builder for Port Output motor commands.
    SBrickDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for SBrick BLE protocol operations.
    ScanDsl
    Fluent builder for BLE scan operations.
